mapper.select:
/* [SQL_ID:UserMapper.selectOne]*/ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USER_PASSWORD , A.USER_NAME , A.USER_EMAIL , A.USER_STATUS , A.LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , A.TOKEN_WEIGHT , A.CREATED_BY , TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM SYS_USER A
AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* [SQL_ID:UserMapper.selectByUserIdAndUserPassword]*/ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USER_PASSWORD , A.USER_NAME , A.USER_EMAIL , A.USER_STATUS , A.LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , A.CREATED_BY , TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM SYS_USER A
AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.USER_PASSWORD = #{userPassword}

/* [SQL_ID:UserMapper.selectByUserEmail]*/ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USER_PASSWORD , A.USER_NAME , A.USER_EMAIL , A.USER_STATUS , A.LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , A.CREATED_BY , TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM SYS_USER A
AND A.USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail}
